risk.query: Risk Analyst needs relevant benchmarks and accounting guidance. Focus: ASC 606 revenue recognition, Damodaran sector margins, Damodaran credit rating and spreads, Damodaran debt sector fundamentals, Federal Reserve macro indicators. Context: # Earnings Report Content **Word Count:** 771 **Identified Topics:** Revenue/Sales, Earnings/Profit, Guidance/Outlook, Risks/Challenges, Debt/Liabilities, Cash Flow/Liquidity, Margins ## Full Content ```markdown GLOBALMART HOLDINGS PLC Quarterly Earnings Report â€” Q2 FY2025 Period Ending: June 30, 2025 FINANCIAL HIGHLIGHTS Revenue for Q2 FY2025 was $4.8 billion, a decline of 12% year-over-year, marking the fourth consecutive quarter of revenue contraction. Same-store sales fell 8.3%, with the sharpest declines in our North American and European markets. Gross margin contracted to 22.1%, down from 27.4% in the prior-year quarter, due to aggressive promotional activity to clear excess inventory and rising logistics costs. We recorded $180 million in inventory write-downs during the quarter. Net loss attributable to shareholders was $(340) million, or $(2.15) per diluted share, compared to net income of $45 million, or $0.28 per diluted share, in Q2 FY2024. This includes restructuring charges of $95 million related to the closure of 120 underperforming stores. Operating cash flow was negative at $(210) million. Total debt stands at $6.8 billion against total equity of $2.1 billion, r ... ndependent directors and deemed to be at arm's length. The company has not yet filed its Conflict of Interest declarations for three of its senior executives as required by the governance charter. ```

risk.query: Risk Analyst needs relevant benchmarks and accounting guidance. Focus: ASC 606 revenue recognition, ASC 326 credit losses (CECL), Damodaran sector margins, Damodaran debt sector fundamentals. Context: # Earnings Report Content **Word Count:** 810 **Identified Topics:** Revenue/Sales, Earnings/Profit, Guidance/Outlook, Risks/Challenges, Growth/Opportunities, Debt/Liabilities, Cash Flow/Liquidity, Margins ## Full Content ```markdown FINEDGE CAPITAL LTD Quarterly Earnings Report â€” Q3 FY2025 Period Ending: September 30, 2025 FINANCIAL HIGHLIGHTS Revenue for Q3 FY2025 was $890 million, an increase of 18% year-over-year, primarily driven by strong growth in our Digital Payments and Lending Platform segments. However, revenue growth decelerated from 26% in Q1 and 22% in Q2, reflecting market saturation in several key geographies. Gross margin was 54.3%, relatively flat compared to 55.1% in the prior-year quarter. Net income was $78 million, or $0.62 per diluted share, compared to $72 million, or $0.57 per diluted share, in Q3 FY2024. On an adjusted basis, excluding $35 million in regulatory compliance costs and $20 million in acquisition integration expenses, adjusted net income was $133 million. Operating cash flow was $145 million. Total debt stands at $1.8 billion against total equity of $2.4 billion, giving a debt-to-equity ratio of 0.75. Cash and equivalents were $620 million at ...  as a trigger event. Note: The company has not yet published its annual ESG report for FY2024, which was due in August 2025. Management has indicated the report will be published by November 2025. ```
